name: Number C79: Battlin' Boxer General Kaiser
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>７９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のカエサル
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Nanajūkyū Bāningu Nakkurā Shōsei no Kaesaru
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 79: Burning Knuckler Commander Caesar
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
Gains 200 ATK for each material attached to it. Once per turn, when your opponent would Special Summon a monster(s) (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card, and if you do, negate the Summon, and if you do that, destroy that monster(s). If this card has "Number 79: Battlin' Boxer Nova Kaiser" as material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn, when an attack is declared involving your "Battlin' Boxer" monster and an opponent's monster: You can send 1 "Battlin' Boxer" monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, and if you do, attach that opponent's monster to this card as material.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials for effect
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Attaches from your opponent's field as Xyz Material
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
